sections.description: The AI management layer for WordPress (MCP tools for AI agents).
sections.changelog:
2.11.3

  • Updater detection hardening: inject on the transient read filter; 1h manifest cache.

2.11.2

  • Update View details shows a live abilities summary (count + per-group breakdown).

2.11.1

  • Self-hosted updater: native WordPress Update button, no wp-config token.
